title: Three Alien Craft Hover Over Nuclear Plant In Japan
description: The Genkai incident centers on a nighttime airspace intrusion over a Japanese nuclear power station. On July 26, 2025, security personnel observed three separate lights assessed as drone-like within the plant grounds/airspace. Kyushu Electric [...]

title: Alien Craft Lands In The Woods Of Sweden
description: 5-18-46 KRONOSKOGEN SWEDEN The 1946 Angelholm UFO incident involves Gösta Carlsson, a 28-year old Swedish railway worker who claimed to see a UFO land in a forest clearing in the Kronoskogen Woods near Angelholm, Sweden, and encountered humanoid [...]

title: Steven Spielberg Says Aliens Have Been Here and “Are Here” While Discussing New UFO Thriller ‘Disclosure Day’
description: The legendary director says he's still waiting for his own alien encounter.

title: Haunting photos show 'UFO' Biden admin used $500,000 missile to shoot down... what it turned out to be was far more 'embarrassing'
description: In February 2023, F-16s scrambled to confront an octagonal object hovering 20,000 feet above Lake Huron in Michigan before blasting it from the sky with an AIM-9 Sidewinder missile.

title: ‘UFO’ Shot Down Over Lake Huron Was Actually a Boy Scout Balloon, Former US Officials Reveal
description: What was once treated as a potential UFO threat over Lake Huron may have been nothing more than a Boy Scout research balloon, according to former US government officials who say the military's response was influenced by the fallout from the Chinese spy balloon incident.
